name: Income Tax Forgiveness for Victims of Terroristic or Military Action

eligibility.description: Applies to military or civilian employees of the U.S. who die from wounds or injuries incurred in a terroristic or military action.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Forgives income tax for U.S. military or civilian employees who die from injuries sustained in a terroristic or military action directed against the U.S. or its allies.
